ddls:
CREATE TABLE "polls" (
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poll */,
  "pollster_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pollster conducting the poll */,
  "poll_date" TEXT /* Date the poll was conducted */,
  "sample_size" TEXT /* Sample size of the poll (e.g., 804 LV) */,
  "mccain" REAL /* Percentage of respondents supporting John McCain */,
  "obama" REAL /* Percentage of respondents supporting Barack Obama */,
  "barr" REAL /* Percentage of respondents supporting Bob Barr */,
  "nader" REAL /* Percentage of respondents supporting Ralph Nader */,
  "other" REAL /* Percentage of respondents supporting other candidates */,
  "undecided" REAL /* Percentage of respondents who are undecided */,
  "margin" TEXT /* Margin of victory (e.g., +9D) */,
  "poll_name" TEXT /* Name of the poll for easier identification */,
  "poll_type" TEXT /* Type of poll (e.g., national, regional, local) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the poll started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the poll ended */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the poll */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_pollster_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollster_id") REFERENCES pollsters ("pollster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollsters" (
  "pollster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollster */,
  "pollster_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollster */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the pollster */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the pollster */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Name of the organization conducting the poll */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the pollster */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the pollster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollster_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "pollster_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pollster using the method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "methodology_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the methodology */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Whether this method is the default for the pollster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pollster_methods_pollster_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollster_id") REFERENCES pollsters ("pollster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollster_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "pollster_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pollster conducting polls in the region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., state, city, local) */,
  "boundaries" TEXT /* Geographic boundaries of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pollster_regions_pollster_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollster_id") REFERENCES pollsters ("pollster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party of the candidate */,
  "party_affiliation" TEXT /* Candidate's party affiliation */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_candidate_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of respondents supporting the candidate */,
  "score_type" TEXT /* Type of score (e.g., percentage, number of votes) */,
  "demographic" TEXT /* Demographic information for the score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_candidate_scores_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_candidate_scores_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used in the poll */,
  "sample_size" TEXT /* Sample size of the poll */,
  "margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for the poll */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_metadata_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "username" TEXT /* Unique username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the poll */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the poll was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., update, insert, delete) */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_history_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)
